name: campuspulse-monorepo
description: Unified Campus Intelligence Dashboard with AI Assistant powered by MCP

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:orchestrator && npm run install:library && npm run install:events && npm run install:notices
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "frontend,orchestrator,lib-mcp,cafe-mcp,eve-mcp,acad-mcp,note-mcp" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgRed,bgWhite" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix orchestrator" "npm run dev --prefix mcp-servers/library-server" "mcp-servers\\cafeteria-server\\.venv\\Scripts\\python mcp-servers/cafeteria-server/main.py" "npm run dev --prefix mcp-servers/events-server" "mcp-servers\\academics-server\\.venv\\Scripts\\python mcp-servers/academics-server/main.py" "npm run dev --prefix mcp-servers/notices-transport-server"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix orchestrator && npm run build --prefix mcp-servers/library-server && npm run build --prefix mcp-servers/events-server && npm run build --prefix mcp-servers/notices-transport-server
scripts.start: npx concurrently -n "frontend,orchestrator,lib-mcp,cafe-mcp,eve-mcp,acad-mcp,note-mcp" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgRed,bgWhite" "npm run start --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix orchestrator" "npm run start --prefix mcp-servers/library-server" "mcp-servers\\cafeteria-server\\.venv\\Scripts\\python mcp-servers/cafeteria-server/main.py" "npm run start --prefix mcp-servers/events-server" "mcp-servers\\academics-server\\.venv\\Scripts\\python mcp-servers/academics-server/main.py" "npm run start --prefix mcp-servers/notices-transport-server"
